title: Fintech SoFi's profit doubles on record loan, member growth
text: SoFi Technologies reported record member growth and loan originations alongside doubled profitability. The company added a record 1.1 million members in Q1 2026, bringing its total to 14.7 million members, representing 35% year-over-year growth. This marked the third consecutive quarter of 35% member growth. GAAP net income reached $166.7 million in Q1 2026, up 2.3 times year-over-year. Product growth accelerated to 39% with 1.8 million new products added, bringing total products to 22.2 million. Loan originations hit record levels at $12.2 billion with significant growth across personal loans, student loans, and home loans. Adjusted net revenue reached $1.1 billion in the first quarter, up 41% year-over-year, and adjusted EBITDA was $340 million, up 62% year-over-year. The company added $3.6 billion in new partner commitments for its loan platform business in Q1 alone, with demand from partners exceeding contractual obligations. For the full year 2026, SoFi continues to guide for approximately 30% growth in both members and revenue.
